title: antidesma catanduanense
intro: Antidesma catanduanense, also known as the Catanduanes Antidesma or more commonly known as the Catanduanes Ironwood, is a plant species native to the Philippines, specifically in the island of Catanduanes. It has been used traditionally in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Antidesma catanduanense include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. The herbal preparations of Antidesma catanduanense typically involve boiling the plant's bark or leaves in water to make a tea, or using the plant's extract as a supplement.
